title: Licorice's Better HUD
description: Makes the HUD icons more modern, while keeping the vanilla feel
body:
# About Pack
Updates the hud to be more in line with
modern minecraft textures while still keeping that vanilla feel to it.
Mostly basing on vanilla items, potion effect icons and a few of
original ideas sprinkled in.

### Mod Support:
- AppleSkin
- Oreganized
- Detail Armor Bar
- Dehydration

### External Links:
- [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/tymgus-better-hud/)
- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-hud)
